transcript.text:
I'm excited
[What can this be..???]
[It's Budae-jjigae] (Spicy sausage stew]
[Slurp the noodles]
[Scoop some over rice!]
[What a sight...]
That's a lot
It's nothing compared to 5 servings that you just had
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jeonnong-dong today
I'm here to try the local's favorite restaurant
[Bonghwang Budae Jjigae] [Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu]
This place specialized in Budae-jjigae for 30 years
I've been wanting some hot soup because I had KBBQ yesterday
Let's head over
It's going to be great

Hello
You're so skinny
Tell me your secret
I thought it was just going to be budae-jjigae on the menu
but they also have grilled sausages
Up to how many servings can you fit in the pot?
5 servings
5 servings of budae-jjigae and grilled sausages, please
Huh? By yourself?
What's the most bowls of rice you had before?
I've had about 14 before
[Oh my...]
They can serve up to 5 servings
What a bummer
They have ice cream here The ones you scoop out
I love ice cream I get 3 scoops all the time

I'll have some in a bit
That's big!
A cauldron
Hold that right there for me
-Close it now? -Yes
Budae-jjigae in a big pot like this
I really love eating it from a cauldron
[Side dishes]
Kimchi looks delicious
Just as expected
I give this a 10 out of 10
I can eat a bowl of rice with just the side dishes
I'm excited
It needs to be cooked a little more But I love undercooked ramyun noodles
So I'll eat some
Bon appetit

I love the noodles in here
[Wait! Don't forget about us!]
Thank you!
The soup is amazing Hold up
I watch you all the time from my phone Where's my money?
Right Why don't they pay the viewers?
You have to click "like"
[So cute]
[They're clicking "like" on the videos]
It's very refreshing
-Tastes clean, right? -Yes
The soup is on the thicker side
I feel like it'll taste even better over time
Glass noodles
These cook really quickly
That distinct budae-jjigae taste and that garlic taste

This ham is delicious
Really good
Grilled sausages
This is...
My mom used to bring home these sausages from E-mart
Kimchi flavor, curry flavor, All these different colors
This looks similar to those
Tastes similar too
Really tasty It's been a while
-Cook it a little more -Okay
Eat it with bean sprouts
Okay thank you
Let's get all the noodles There's so much
I'm happy
Some soup over the noodles
Let's eat some sausages while I wait for it to cool down

I love these
Really good
I eat these all the time when I have pork belly
Brings back old memories
It's hot
I don't bite off my noodles, but this is way too hot
[Take your time]
Excuse me, 1 bowl of rice, please
On top like this
Thank you
Comes out like this
To mix the soup
This is definitely hitting the spot
Rice cake
Rice cake goes so well with budae-jjigae
Delicious

Sausage
This may not look a lot but it's very deep towards the center
The soup tastes better and better over time
More flavors come from the ham
It's hot
Tasty
It's great
Lovely
This particular dish gives you the most satisfaction
I always think that I had a great meal after eating budae-jjigae
[That's how you film?]
-Is it filming well? -Yes
I prefer a lot of soup over rice rather than a mix
I just love eating it like this
Strong garlic flavors
That's why the soup feels more thick

She's pretty, has a great body, can eat well,
And she's skinny? Everyone is jealous
5 people eat what she's eating right now
5 servings
And she's drinking 5 cans of coke
She told me to add bean sprouts
The texture is great
The taste of bean sprouts too
Can I have some ice cream right now?
I want some
But the owner is not here right now
I'd like to ask
Attack the sausages!
Ma'am Can I have some ice cream?
[Eat eat]
Don't fall

They only have 1 flavor
But I'm grateful
They always have these types of ice cream at gamjatang restaurants
I've always wanted to eat it before the meal, during the meal, and after the meal
But my mom only allowed me to have it as dessert
I can eat it during the meal now since I'm an adult
I don't like tofu
What should I do?
I guess I'll have like this too then
Come to think of it, you like to eat chili pepper pancakes, right?
[Fine, I guess so]
Thank you
They will say that I'm being a picky eater
[We'll let it slide this one time!]
Chunks!
How come you don't have a belly?

I have a little
A little?
I guess you can order 1 serving here too
Yes, you can dine alone
It's big portions
This is nothing compared to 5 servings
You're not wrong
Oh, she's having 5 servings right now?
Yes, I had 5 servings
Other places will give you 1 serving in a smaller pot
But they serve it in the cauldron here
Even if you're dining in by yourself
[Skewer with the chopstick]
It'd be silly to eat this in 1 bite, right?
Are you eating ice cream?
The owner is getting herself one

Did you put that there for yourself?
[Shh.. don't tell anyone]
Should I do that for my restaurant too?
Let's cook these in here
Let's heat it up really quick
Last
Customers are starting to come in
It tastes the best towards the end
Can't go wrong with this last bowl
Finished
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
